📋 Attendance Present: 0 / 0

Everyone starts present. Tap a name to mark it absent; tap again for present. Your marks are saved on this device.

📚 Word Wall Tap 🔊 to listen

Look at the picture, listen, then say the word out loud. Tap as many times as you like!

Words:

🎡 Spin & Say the fun repeat game!

Spin the wheel. Look at the word and picture, then you say it out loud three times. Press I said it! ⭐

Press Play, listen carefully, then click the picture you hear.

Look at the picture and listen, then click the word that matches.

✏️ Activity — Spell It type the missing letters!

Look at the picture and listen. You get the first letter — type the rest of the letters yourself on your keyboard.

🧩 Activity — Build a Sentence from our slides!

Look at the picture and press 🔊 Hear it. Then tap the word blocks in order to build the sentence, just like the puzzle blocks.
